prestazioni: Engine: Replace the stock 1.5L or 2.0L Skyactiv-G (PE-VPS for NA, PE-VPR for RF) with a forged internals build featuring Manley H-beam connecting rods, JE 8.5:1 compression pistons, and a K1 Technologies crankshaft to handle forced induction. Pair with a Garrett GTX2860R turbocharger (0.63 A/R turbine housing) and a custom 3.5-inch intercooler from GReddy, plumbed with Vibrant Performance silicone hoses and T-bolt clamps. Fuel system upgrades include a Walbro 450 LPH in-tank pump, ID1000x injectors, and a Radium Engineering fuel pressure regulator.

Drivetrain: Install a OS Giken Super Lock LSD (1.5-way) with a 4.10 final drive ratio in the stock ND2 differential housing. Replace the stock clutch with a Spec Stage 3+ twin-disc setup and a Fidanza lightweight flywheel. For the transmission, use a PPG short-throw shifter and a Cusco transmission mount insert to reduce slop under hard launches.

Suspension & Handling: Swap the stock suspension for a full Ohlins Road & Track DFV kit (ND2-specific valving) with 600lb/in front springs and 400lb/in rear springs. Add Cusco front and rear sway bars (22mm front, 18mm rear) and poly bushings from SuperPro. For braking, install a StopTech Big Brake Kit (328mm rotors, 4-piston calipers) with Ferodo DS2500 pads and Motul RBF660 brake fluid.
estetica: Aero: Fit a Rocket Bunny V3 widebody kit (ND2-specific) with carbon fiber overfenders, a duckbill rear spoiler, and a front splitter with integrated canards. Add a custom carbon fiber hardtop delete with a removable roof panel from 949 Racing. For downforce, install a Voltex GT-800 rear wing (1,200mm width) on custom mounts to clear the RF’s retractable roof mechanism.

Exterior: Replace the stock headlights with a set of Morimoto XB LED projectors (DRL and low-beam) and retrofit the taillights with sequential LED units from Diode Dynamics. Paint the car in Mazda’s Soul Red Crystal with a 3M Matte Black vinyl wrap on the roof and mirrors. Add a custom front lip from Seibon Carbon and a rear diffuser from Varis.

Interior: Replace the stock seats with a pair of Bride Zeta III (ND2-specific) reclining buckets, mounted on custom seat rails from Planted Technology. Add a Momo Prototipo steering wheel (350mm, suede) with a NRG quick-release hub. For the dash, install a AIM MXS Strada 5-inch digital dash and a custom roll bar from Hard Dog Motorsports with harness bar mounts for Schroth Profi II 4-point harnesses.
